n: Book 10, Chapter 3: No Word from Wildermore

steps.t: Gléowine is by the barracks in Snowbourn. Gléowine has been brought back to sobriety by something, and seems ready to talk to you.
Horn and Corudan are by the barracks in Snowbourn. Gléowine wants to travel with you to investigate what has happened in Wildermore, but first he need…
One of the children of Snowbourn may know where to find Gléowine's map. Gléowine wishes to travel with you to investigate the curious silence that has…
Britred left on an adventure by the south gate of Snowbourn. How far south did he get on his quest? You were told that Britred took Gléowine's map and…
Gléowine is by the barracks in Snowbourn. You have recovered Gléowine's map and should return it to him.
Horn is by the barracks in Snowbourn. You have returned Gléowine's map and should now speak with Horn about your preparations to travel to Wildermore.
Aldor Harding is in the Mead Hall of Harwick, in the Wold. Fastred has no men to spare in an investigation of Wildermore, and has sent you to give Har…
Gléowine is on the wooden porch outside the Mead Hall in Harwick, in the Wold. Gléowine wishes to speak with you.
